atlas v0.5
Back To Movements

Historical Movement

Art Deco / Streamlined Luxury

几何装饰、流线感和高级感并存。今天它更多以精致和舞台感回到网页中。

Period

1920s-1930s

Origin

France / Europe / US

Why It Matters

不少文化、时尚和奢侈品牌网站，会借 Art Deco 的舞台感、对称感和精致节奏。

Core Traits

先理解这条语言本身

Principles

  • streamlined glamour
  • geometric ornament
  • theatrical hierarchy
  • prestige pacing

Watchouts

  • 容易做得过度复古
  • 不适合高频工具界面

Sample Gallery

历史语言在今天的网页里如何现身

Descendant Families

今天在网页里更接近哪些家族

Web Family

Quiet Lifestyle Editorial

Calmer, slower, more collectible than classic magazine surfaces. The page feels like an issue, catalog, or taste-led brand world.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined Luxury

Best For

fashionlifestylecultural brands
Open family
Web Family

Stage-Driven Showcase

A hero or first fold behaves like a stage. One image, scene, or world carries the page before the rest of the content unfolds.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined LuxuryCyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

Best For

campaignsflagship launchesfilm and entertainment
Open family

Reference Links

继续读历史和看案例

  • Britannica: Art Deco
